commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'echo SUPERVISOR_ENV; docker inspect election-hermes-supervisor-1 --format "{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}" | egrep "^(API_SERVER_KEY|HERMES_DASHBOARD_BASIC_AUTH_PASSWORD|HERMES_DASHBOARD_BASIC_AUTH_SECRET|LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN|LINE_CHANNEL_SECRET|LINE_PUBLIC_URL|OPENROUTER_API_KEY|OPENAI_API_BASE|HERMES_MODEL|LINE_ALLOW_ALL_USERS)="; echo LINE_RELAY_ENV; docker inspect election-line-relay-1 --format "{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}" | egrep "^(SUPERVISOR_S3_BUCKET|SUPERVISOR_S3_PREFIX|SUPERVISOR_OCR_QUEUE_URL|STATIC_RESULTS_S3_BUCKET|STATIC_RESULTS_PREFIX|GOVERNOR_RESULTS_PREFIX|AWS_DEFAULT_REGION|RESULTS_API_INTERNAL_BASE_URL)="; echo OCR_ENV; docker inspect election-ocr-worker-1 --format "{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}" | egrep "^(OCR_WORKER_HERMES_MODEL|OCR_WORKER_MODEL_NAME|OCR_WORKER_QUEUE_MAX_MESSAGES|OCR_WORKER_PROCESSING_CONCURRENCY|OCR_WORKER_QUEUE_VISIBILITY_TIMEOUT)="; echo RESULTS_ENV; docker inspect election-results-api-1 --format "{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}" | egrep "^(RESULTS_API_SOURCE_ELECTION_ID|RESULTS_API_CORS_ORIGINS|RESULTS_API_KEY|RESULTS_API_CANDIDATES_MANIFEST_URL|RESULTS_API_CANDIDATES_FEATURED_URL|RESULTS_API_PARTIES_URL|RESULTS_API_CANDIDATES_TIMEOUT_SECONDS|RESULTS_API_CANDIDATES_CACHE_SECONDS|RESULTS_API_DISTRICTS_URL|RESULTS_API_DISTRICTS_TIMEOUT_SECONDS|RESULTS_API_DISTRICTS_CACHE_SECONDS|RESULTS_API_ELECTION_ID|RESULTS_API_ELECTION_TITLE|RESULTS_API_RESULT_STATUS|RESULTS_API_DELAYED_AFTER_MINUTES|RESULTS_API_DEFAULT_DATA_MODE|RESULTS_API_STATIC_RESULTS_PREFIX|RESULTS_API_ENABLE_STATIC_FALLBACK|RESULTS_API_S3_PREFIX)="; echo CADDY_ENV; docker inspect election-caddy-1 --format "{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}" | egrep "^(PUBLIC_SCHEME|PUBLIC_DOMAIN|CADDY_EMAIL)="; echo SUPERVISOR_MOUNTS; docker inspect election-hermes-supervisor-1 --format "{{range .Mounts}}{{println .Source}}{{end}}"; echo IMAGES; docker inspect election-line-relay-1 --format "line-relay-image={{.Config.Image}}"; docker inspect election-ocr-worker-1 --format "ocr-worker-image={{.Config.Image}}"; docker inspect election-results-api-1 --format "results-api-image={{.Config.Image}}"; docker inspect election-hermes-supervisor-1 --format "hermes-image={{.Config.Image}}"'
